column1: This setting will be used to preload images or load them from scratch when they appear on the screen.

column1: Show a preview image before the real image loads.

column1: This setting will be used to exclude the X number of images from Lazy Load. Based on count this option will decide how many images to load without lazy loading. For example: 3
column2: This setting will be used to exclude the X number of images from Lazy Load. Based on count this option will decide how many images to load without lazy loading. For example: 3

column1: This feature will be used when there will be a compatibility issue with image loading. Provide a part of an image tag content into the field and all images containing the inserted lines in their tags will be excluded from the extension's Lazy Load. For example: owl
column2: This feature will be used when there will be a compatibility issue with image loading. Provide a part of an image tag content into the field and all images containing the inserted lines in their tags will be excluded from the extension's Lazy Load. For example: owl

column1: This setting will provide option to the user to exclude pages from Lazy Load.
